title: Demo 2: dame loop capture ending on the original square.
description:
Demo 2: dame loop capture ending on the original square.

The white dame on E4 can capture four black pieces in a loop:
  E4 -> F5 -> G6 -> F7 -> E8 -> D7 -> C6 -> D5 -> E4

It captures F5, F7, D7, and D5, then lands back on E4.
In the REPL, try:
  > e4 e4
